title: Drawing of military stores from the United States government
doc_html:
§9.  Drawing of military stores from the United States government

The governor may draw from the government of the United States of America all military stores to which the state is entitled for the use of the national guard and may give the necessary bonds.  

Acts 1974, No. 622, §1.
doc_text:
§9.  Drawing of military stores from the United States government
The governor may draw from the government of the United States of America all military stores to which the state is entitled for the use of the national guard and may give the necessary bonds.
Acts 1974, No. 622, §1.
